name: ace-tool
description: ACE — semantic code search. Understands code structure across languages. Better than grep for exploring unfamiliar codebases.
setup: 1) Register at https://augmentcode.com (free account works — code search does not consume credits). 2) Get your token: write ~/.augment/session.json with {accessToken, tenantURL, scopes:["read","write"]}. 3) npm i -g ace-tool. Optional: self-host relay via https://github.com/heromantf/acemcp-relay for multi-user/team use.
